name: php-hierarchy-lens
description: PhpStorm-style CodeLens and gutter indicators for interface implementations, class inheritance, method overrides, and trait usage.

phpRelations.enable.markdownDescription: Master switch for all PHP inheritance/implementation indicators. Turn this off to disable both CodeLens and gutter icons.

phpRelations.codeLens.enable.markdownDescription: Show indicators as **CodeLens** (clickable text above declarations, e.g. `2 implementations`).

phpRelations.gutterIcons.enable.markdownDescription: Show indicators as **gutter icons** (up/down glyphs in the margin, with a hover link).

enumDescriptions: Thin line arrows with a shaft.
Circular badge with an arrow inside (PhpStorm-like).
phpRelations.gutterIcons.style.markdownDescription: Which gutter glyph set to use. Up = **orange** (implements/overrides parent), down = **blue** (implementations/inheritors/overrides).

phpRelations.gutterIcons.opacity.markdownDescription: Gutter icon opacity as a percentage (`10` = faint, `100` = opaque). Lower values blend into the editor theme.

phpRelations.gutterIcons.hover.markdownDescription: Show a popup listing related declarations when hovering a line that has a gutter icon. (Requires gutter icons enabled.)

phpRelations.gutterIcons.hoverLimit.markdownDescription: Maximum number of items listed in the hover popup before it shows “…and N more”.

phpRelations.indicators.implementations.markdownDescription: Show **implementations** on interfaces and interface/abstract methods (who implements this).

phpRelations.indicators.inheritors.markdownDescription: Show **inheritors** on classes (subclasses that extend this class).

phpRelations.indicators.overrides.markdownDescription: Show **overrides** on methods (methods in subclasses that override this one).

phpRelations.indicators.parent.markdownDescription: Show the upward **implements / overrides** link to the base declaration a method or class derives from.

phpRelations.indicators.traitUsages.markdownDescription: Show **trait usages** on trait declarations (classes that `use` this trait).

phpRelations.exclude.markdownDescription: Glob patterns for PHP files to exclude from indexing. Types in excluded files (e.g. `vendor`) won't get indicators or appear as relationship targets.
